why.title: Why ProSe Ready?
why.subtitle: Because we give you real preparation to face your process with confidence.

features.title: Understand your case
features.desc: Analyze the key points of your asylum narrative and strengthen your story.

features.title: One step ahead
features.desc: Anticipate the tough questions the officer might ask you.

features.title: Know the risks
features.desc: Identify possible contradictions before your official appointment.

features.title: No improvising
features.desc: Arrive prepared with clear, legally structured answers.

features.title: Total calm
features.desc: Reduce anxiety by practicing in a safe and private environment.

problem.title: Saturated legal aid and language barriers
problem.desc: The legal system is overwhelmed and not knowing what to expect dramatically increases the risk of denial. ProSe Ready bridges the technology gap so you can defend your case with the same tools as an expert.

steps.title: Understand your case
steps.desc: Analyze the key points of your asylum narrative and strengthen your story.

steps.title: Practice the interview
steps.desc: Simulate real questions with our AI trained on USCIS processes.

steps.title: Get feedback
steps.desc: Identify contradictions and areas for improvement before your official appointment.

scenarios.title: Practice Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Designed to replicate exactly each stage of the immigration process.

items.title: USCIS (Asylum Office)
items.desc: Ideal for those inside the U.S. who voluntarily apply for asylum. Focus on credibility and details of the account.

items.title: Credible Fear
items.desc: Preparation for the critical border interview. Learn to identify and communicate the key elements of persecution under pressure.

items.title: Immigration Court
items.desc: Simulate a cross-examination by the government attorney (ICE) and direct questions from the Immigration Judge.

pricing.title: Preparation Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the option that best fits your current stage.
pricing.note: Prices in USD. You can cancel at any time.

items.a: No. ProSe Ready is a complementary preparation tool. We always recommend having professional legal counsel for your case.
Yes. We use bank-grade encryption and do not share your data or narratives with third parties. Your privacy is our absolute priority.

items.q: In what languages can I practice?
items.a: Our AI supports Spanish, English, French and 20+ other languages, allowing you to practice in your native language or the interview language.

cta.title: Don't leave your future
cta.subtitle: Thousands of applicants have improved their confidence and clarity with our interactive simulations.

footer.desc: AI-powered asylum interview simulator to help asylum seekers prepare for their future.
footer.disclaimer: DISCLAIMER: ProSe Ready is a technology platform and is not a law firm, does not provide legal advice and is not a substitute for an attorney. We are not affiliated with USCIS, ICE, DHS or any U.S. government agency.
